top3.sql:
SELECT lt.raceId, lt.driverId, lt.lap, lt.time, lt.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT l.raceId, l.driverId, l.lap, l.time, l.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT lt.raceId, lt.driverId, lt.lap, lt.time, lt.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT lt.raceId, lt.driverId, lt.lap, lt.time, lt.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY lt.time;

SELECT l.raceId, l.driverId, l.lap, l.time, l.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT lt.raceId, lt.driverId, lt.lap, lt.time, lt.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    r.name AS race_name,
    r.year,
    l.driverId,
    l.lap,
    l.time AS lap_time,
    l.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes l
JOIN races r ON l.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY c.name, r.year, l.lap;

SELECT 
    c.name AS circuit_name,
    r.name AS race_name,
    r.date AS race_date,
    lt.driverId,
    lt.lap,
    lt.time AS lap_time,
    lt.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy'
ORDER BY c.name, r.date, lt.lap;

final.sql:
SELECT lt.raceId, lt.driverId, lt.lap, lt.time, lt.milliseconds
FROM lapTimes lt
JOIN races r ON lt.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN circuits c ON r.circuitId = c.circuitId
WHERE c.country = 'Italy';
